Key Features: Non-tumorigenic used as a control in breast cancer research immortalized but non-transformed
Estrogen receptor-positive (ER+) commonly used in hormone receptor-targeted therapies
Highly aggressive triple-negative (ER- PR- HER2-) used in metastasis research
Primary samples derived from AML patients used for diagnostic and therapeutic research
Used for studying differentiation apoptosis and chemotherapeutic drug responses
CD34-positive used in stem cell and leukemia research especially in relation to drug resistance
